level_signals: Leading product vision, strategy, and roadmap across major business verticals
Executive alignment and cross-functional leadership scope
Base pay range $200K-$240K USD, consistent with senior/staff IC at Airbnb
Desire to do individual contributor product management work

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience creating product messaging and delivering to customers and the media.
Demonstrated track record of building cross-functional and executive leadership alignment.
Experience working on consumer products with marketplace dynamic on a global scale.
Entrepreneurial track record of taking an idea to reality.
A strong ability to effectively use data and perform business analysis to support product strategy/decisions.
Excited to drive execution across teams in a fast-paced environment.
Desire to do individual contributor product management work.

scope.surface: Airbnb Homepage and Guest Discovery experience (Homes, Services, Experiences, Hotels, Luxe, Partnerships)
primary_metrics_inferred: Lifecycle and growth marketing campaign performance
core_responsibilities: Lead the product vision, strategy, and roadmap for the discovery needs of all key business verticals (e.g. Homes, Services, Experiences, International) and new bets (e.g. Hotels, Luxe, Partnerships)
Lead the development of new discovery features and content formats that drive core guest and bookings growth.
Incorporate the latest AI technologies and relevance models to uplevel Airbnb's browsing experience
Collaborate with marketing teams to extend Airbnb's discovery strategy to our lifecycle and growth marketing campaigns.
Craft the product narrative and marketing strategies that communicate the benefits and features of these products both internally and externally.

Develop product roadmaps and build alignment across product teams (Tech, Design), cross-functional partners (FP&A, Marketing, Global Operations, Customer Experience, Trust, etc.) and Leadership/Executive team.
Inspire teams, leadership, and the company to support the success of your products and business outcomes.
Build deep expertise on the subject matter both through user research, marketplace data, and an understanding of the competitive landscape.
Define goals and success with clearly measurable objectives and key results.
Efficiently execute to ship products and deliver impact for our business and users.

compensation.equity_form: bonus, equity, benefits, and Employee Travel Credits mentioned

green_flags: Clearly defined product surface with real ownership (Homepage + Discovery for all verticals)
High-visibility role driving core guest growth metrics
Equity and bonus mentioned in addition to base
Role explicitly designed for individual contributor (not people manager)
red_flags: Role requires physical presence in San Francisco, Los Angeles, Seattle, or New York — fully remote not eligible
Visa sponsorship not addressed in the JD
Broad scope spanning all business verticals (Homes, Services, Experiences, Hotels, Luxe, Partnerships) may imply significant complexity and stakeholder load
8+ years experience floor with senior/exec alignment expectations makes this a high bar role

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range $200K-$240K and 8+ years requirement)
scope.business_model (inferred from consumer marketplace product description)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
ambiguities: JD lists four city options (SF, LA, Seattle, NY) but states the role requires being 'based in' one of them; it is unclear whether hybrid/partial-remote within those cities is permitted or if fully in-office is required — treated as onsite.
No 'Preferred' or 'Nice to have' section present in the JD; all bullets under 'Your Expertise' treated as must-haves with hard severity.
